name: ServiceCard
description: A card component for displaying service information with an icon, title, description, and link.

description.description: A brief description of the service.

icon.description: Lucide icon component or similar SVGR component.

href.description: URL to the detailed service page.

requirements: The card should interact as a single link if the whole card is clickable, or contain a distinct link.
Images/Icons must be decorative if they don't add semantic value (aria-hidden=true).
Heading hierarchy must be preserved (e.g., H3).
